member.name: T:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw
member.summary: Defines static methods used to throw exceptions.
member.remarks: The main purpose is to reduce code size, improve performance, and standardize exception messages.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
member.param: Object to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified argument is , or if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Argument type to be checked for .
Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to be checked for .
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfMemberNull``2(``0,``1,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the specified member is .
member.typeparam: Member type to be checked for .
member.param: Argument to which member belongs.
Object member to be checked for .
The name of the parameter being checked.
The name of the member.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws either an or an if the specified string is or whitespace respectively.
member.param: String to be checked for or whitespace.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the string is , or if it is empty.
member.param: String to be checked for or empty.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfBufferTooSmall(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the argument's buffer size is less than the required buffer size.
member.param: The actual buffer size.
The required buffer size.
The name of the parameter to be checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfOutOfRange``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the enum value is not valid.
member.param: The argument to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.IfNullOrEmpty``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Throws an if the collection is , or if it is empty.
member.param: The collection to evaluate.
The name of the parameter being checked.
member.typeparam: The type of objects in the collection.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.summary: Throws an .

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.

A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Shared.Diagnostics.Throw.ArgumentException(System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: The name of the parameter that caused the exception.
A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.
member.remarks: If the is not a , the current exception is raised in a catch block that handles the inner exception.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.

member.summary: Throws an .
member.param: A message that describes the error.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception.

member.summary: Throws an if the specified number is less than min.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ConfigurationServiceEndpointProviderOptions
member.summary: Options for .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ConfigurationServiceEndpointProviderOptions.SectionName
member.summary: The name of the configuration section which contains service endpoints. Defaults to "Services".

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ConfigurationServiceEndpointProviderOptions.ShouldApplyHostNameMetadata
member.summary: Gets or sets a delegate used to determine whether to apply host name metadata to each resolved endpoint. Defaults to a delegate which returns false.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Configuration.ConfigurationServiceEndpointProvider
member.summary: A service endpoint provider that uses configuration to resolve resolved.
Initializes a new instance.
member.param: The query.
The configuration.
The logger.
Configuration provider options.
Service discovery options.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Configuration.ConfigurationServiceEndpointProviderFactory
member.summary: implementation that resolves services using .
implementation that resolves services using .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.HttpServiceEndpointResolver
member.summary: Resolves endpoints for HTTP requests.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.HttpServiceEndpointResolver.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcherFactory,System.IServiceProvider,System.TimeProvider)
member.summary: Resolves endpoints for HTTP requests.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.HttpServiceEndpointResolver.GetEndpointAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves and returns a service endpoint for the specified request.
member.param: The request message.
A .
member.exception: The request had no set or a suitable endpoint could not be found.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.IServiceDiscoveryHttpMessageHandlerFactory
member.summary: Factory which creates instances which resolve endpoints using service discovery before delegating to a provided handler.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.IServiceDiscoveryHttpMessageHandlerFactory.CreateHandler(System.Net.Http.HttpMessageHandler)
member.summary: Creates an instance which resolve endpoints using service discovery before delegating to a provided handler.
member.param: The handler to delegate to.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.ResolvingHttpClientHandler
member.summary: which resolves endpoints using service discovery.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.ResolvingHttpClientHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.HttpServiceEndpointResolver,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions})
member.summary: which resolves endpoints using service discovery.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.ResolvingHttpDelegatingHandler
member.summary: HTTP message handler which resolves endpoints using service discovery.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.ResolvingHttpDelegatingHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Http.HttpServiceEndpointResolver,Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance.
member.param: The endpoint resolver.
The service discovery options.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance.
member.param: The endpoint resolver.
The service discovery options.
The inner handler.

member.summary: Represents the result of service endpoint resolution.
member.param: The endpoint collection.
The exception which occurred during resolution.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Internal.ServiceEndpointResolverResult.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointSource,System.Exception)
member.summary: Represents the result of service endpoint resolution.
member.param: The endpoint collection.
The exception which occurred during resolution.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Internal.ServiceEndpointResolverResult.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception which occurred during resolution.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Internal.ServiceEndpointResolverResult.ResolvedSuccessfully
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether resolution completed successfully.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.Internal.ServiceEndpointResolverResult.EndpointSource
member.summary: Gets the endpoints.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.LoadBalancing.IServiceEndpointSelector
member.summary: Selects endpoints from a collection of endpoints.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.LoadBalancing.IServiceEndpointSelector.SetEndpoints(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointSource)
member.summary: Sets the collection of endpoints which this instance will select from.
member.param: The collection of endpoints to select from.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.LoadBalancing.IServiceEndpointSelector.GetEndpoint(System.Object)
member.summary: Selects an endpoints from the collection provided by the most recent call to .
member.param: The context.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.LoadBalancing.RoundRobinServiceEndpointSelector
member.summary: Selects endpoints by iterating through the list of endpoints in a round-robin fashion.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.PassThrough.PassThroughServiceEndpointProvider
member.summary: Service endpoint provider which passes through the provided value.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.PassThrough.PassThroughServiceEndpointProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Net.EndPoint)
member.summary: Service endpoint provider which passes through the provided value.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.PassThrough.PassThroughServiceEndpointProviderFactory
member.summary: Service endpoint provider factory which creates pass-through providers.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.PassThrough.PassThroughServiceEndpointProviderFactory.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.PassThrough.PassThroughServiceEndpointProvider})
member.summary: Service endpoint provider factory which creates pass-through providers.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions
member.summary: Options for service endpoint resolution.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions.AllowAllSchemes
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether all URI schemes for URIs resolved by the service discovery system are allowed. If this value is , all URI schemes are allowed. If this value is , only the schemes specified in are allowed.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions.RefreshPeriod
member.summary: Gets or sets the period between polling attempts for providers which do not support refresh notifications via .

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions.AllowedSchemes
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of allowed URI schemes for URIs resolved by the service discovery system when multiple schemes are specified, for example "https+http://_endpoint.service".
member.remarks: When is , this property is ignored.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions.ApplyAllowedSchemes(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Filters the specified URI schemes to include only those that are applicable, based on the current settings.
member.param: The URI schemes to be evaluated against the allowed schemes.
member.returns: The URI schemes that are applicable. If no schemes are requested, all allowed schemes are returned. If all schemes are allowed, only the requested schemes are returned. Otherwise, the intersection of requested and allowed schemes is returned.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointBuilder
member.summary: A mutable collection of service endpoints.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointBuilder.AddChangeToken(Microsoft.Extensions.Primitives.IChangeToken)
member.summary: Adds a change token.
member.param: The change token.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointBuilder.Features
member.summary: Gets the feature collection.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointBuilder.Endpoints
member.summary: Gets the endpoints.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointBuilder.Build
member.summary: Creates a from the provided instance.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointResolver
member.summary: Resolves service names to collections of endpoints.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointResolver.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcherFactory,System.TimeProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The watcher factory.
The time provider.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointResolver.GetEndpointsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves and returns service endpoints for the specified service.
member.param: The service name.
A .

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcher
member.summary: Watches for updates to the collection of resolved endpoints for a specified service.
Watches for updates to the collection of resolved endpoints for a specified service.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcher.ServiceName
member.summary: Gets the service name.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcher.OnEndpointsUpdated
member.summary: Gets or sets the action called when endpoints are updated.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcher.Start
member.summary: Starts the endpoint resolver.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcher.GetEndpointsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a collection of resolved endpoints for the service.
member.param: A .
member.returns: A collection of resolved endpoints for the service.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcherFactory
member.summary: Creates service endpoint watchers.
Creates service endpoint watchers.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceEndpointWatcherFactory.CreateWatcher(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a service endpoint watcher for the provided service name.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryHttpClientBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for configuring with service discovery.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryHttpClientBuilderExtensions.AddServiceDiscovery(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IHttpClientBuilder)
member.summary: Adds service discovery to the .
member.param: The builder.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring service discovery.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceDiscovery(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the core service discovery services and configures defaults.
member.param: The service collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceDiscovery(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions})
member.summary: Adds the core service discovery services and configures defaults.
member.param: The service collection.
The delegate used to configure service discovery options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceDiscoveryCore(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the core service discovery services.
member.param: The service collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceDiscoveryCore(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ServiceDiscoveryOptions})
member.summary: Adds the core service discovery services.
member.param: The service collection.
The delegate used to configure service discovery options.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddConfigurationServiceEndpointProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configures a service discovery endpoint provider which uses to resolve endpoints.
member.param: The service collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddConfigurationServiceEndpointProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Microsoft.Extensions.ServiceDiscovery.ConfigurationServiceEndpointProviderOptions})
member.summary: Configures a service discovery endpoint provider which uses to resolve endpoints.
member.param: The delegate used to configure the provider.
The service collection.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceDiscoveryServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPassThroughServiceEndpointProvider(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Configures a service discovery endpoint provider which passes through the input without performing resolution.
member.param: The service collection.
